title: Poster
overview: Without problems no human being is on earth it can be love, study, career or anything else. Suicide is not the solution to any problem. We can make our future bright and beautiful, if we can give some space to move ahead, Our film is based on a person story, to whom, first avoided and neglected by everyone. But later the same people welcomed him.
